nasb.text: When he saw that a resting place was good And that the land was pleasant, He bowed his shoulder to bear burdens, And became a slave at forced labor.

esv.text: He saw that a resting place was good, and that the land was pleasant, so he bowed his shoulder to bear, and became a servant at forced labor.

cnv.text: 他看安居為美， 他看肥地為佳， 他屈肩負重， 成了服苦的奴僕。

ccb.text: 他见那地方好作安身之处， 地土肥美，就垂下肩头， 做了奴隶。

csbs.text: 他见安居之处美好， 见那地令人喜悦， 就屈肩负重， 成为服苦的奴役。
